title: Two Sum
coreIdea: Find two indices in an array whose values sum to a target, by storing each visited value in a hashmap and checking if its complement (target - value) has already been seen.
recognitionCues: asks for a pair summing to a target
single pass with O(n) hinted over brute force O(n^2)
approach: Traverse the array once. For each element, compute complement = target - element. If complement exists in the hashmap, return its stored index and current index. Otherwise, store current element's value and index in the hashmap.
